tool_args.content:
Backup existing brain_server.py
Copy-Item 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py' 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server_backup.py'
# Apply the patch
Invoke-Expression "git apply patches\brain_episode_v1.diff"
# Compile
python -m py_compile 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py'
# Run smoke tests
